allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\briankehoe\\Documents\\Work\\Python\\CernerScraper\\Development\\CernerScraper\\Outputs\\Corpus\\mpages_documents.jsonl" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json -AsHashtable; $lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\briankehoe\\Documents\\Work\\Python\\CernerScraper\\Development\\CernerScraper\\Outputs\\Corpus\\mpages_documents.jsonl"; $count = 0; foreach \($line in $lines\) { if \($line -match 'cnvtdatetime|cnvtdate|datetimediff'\) { $count++; if \($count -le 3\) { "Line $count \(length: $\($line.Length\)\):"; $line.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(1000, $line.Length\)\); "" } } } "Total lines matching: $count")

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\briankehoe\\Documents\\Work\\Python\\CernerScraper\\Development\\CernerScraper\\Outputs\\Corpus\\mpages_chunks.jsonl"; $count = 0; foreach \($line in $lines\) { if \($line -match 'cnvtdatetime|cnvtdate|datetimediff'\) { $count++; if \($count -le 3\) { "=== Chunk $count ==="; $json = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; "Title: $\($json.parent_doc_title\)"; "Content \(first 500 chars\): " + \($json.content -replace '\\s+', ' '\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(800, $json.content.Length\)\); "" } } }; "Total matching chunks: $count")
